title: SEDI: Search for Extra-Dimensional Intelligence — n=6 Arithmetic Patterns in Particle Physics
description: Systematic analysis of particle physics data using the arithmetic of perfect number 6. Fisher-combined 5.26σ significance from independent findings: QCD resonance ladder (ρ×4=J/ψ×3=Υ, 3.8σ), Higgs decay branching ratios (H→bb̄=7/12, H→ττ=1/16), and quark-lepton mass bridge ((charm-up)/12=muon, 3.4σ). Includes 29 testable predictions for LHC, LiteBIRD, and Hyper-Kamiokande. All code open-source with Monte Carlo validation.
notes: Companion software to TECS-L mathematical framework. Contact: nerve011235@gmail.com
